summary: The AI agent failed to properly verify the patient's identity and provided incorrect information regarding appointment details, leading to confusion and an incomplete task.

issues.title: Identity Verification Failure
issues.details: The agent acknowledged a mismatch in the patient's birthday but did not take further steps to verify the patient's identity, which is critical for appointment scheduling.
issues.expected: The agent should have asked additional questions or requested confirmation of other identifying information to ensure the patient's identity.

issues.title: Inability to Access Appointment Details
issues.details: The agent stated it could not access the patient's current appointment details, which is a significant limitation for scheduling and confirming appointments.
issues.expected: The agent should have been able to provide the details of the existing appointment or at least offer to retrieve that information from a staff member.

issues.title: Incomplete Task Completion
issues.details: The call ended without successfully scheduling the appointment or confirming any details, leaving the patient without a resolution.
issues.expected: The agent should have confirmed the appointment details or provided a clear next step for the patient to follow.
